NCT00909532.name: STRIVE-CF
NCT00909532.group: CF with at least one G551D mutation (aged >=12y), ivacaftor 150 mg BID vs placebo 48 wk

allOutcomes.title: Change in ppFEV1 through 48 weeks (absolute, placebo-corrected MD)

NCT00909532.snippet: Source: Ramsey BW et al. NEJM 2011;365:1663-1672 (STRIVE ivacaftor).

evidence.label: Enrollment & Primary Outcome
evidence.text: 161 patients aged >=12 with CF and at least one G551D-CFTR mutation randomized to ivacaftor 150 mg BID (n=83) or placebo (n=78) for 48 weeks. Absolute ppFEV1 increased 10.5 percentage points more with ivacaftor vs placebo through week 48 (95% CI 8.5-12.5; P<0.001).

evidence.label: Eligibility (AACT-derived)
evidence.text: AACT-derived (auto-populated 2026-05-04). Sex: ALL; min age 12 Years; healthy volunteers: f. CRITERIA: "Inclusion Criteria:~* Confirmed diagnosis of cystic fibrosis (CF) and G551D mutation in at least 1 allele~* Forced expiratory volume in 1 second (FEV1) of 40% to 90% (inclusive) of predicted normal for age, gender, and height at Screening.~* No clinically significant abnormalities that would have interfered with the study assessments, as judged by the investigator~* Willing to use highly effective birth control methods during the study~Exclusion Criteria:~* History of any illness or condition t...

NCT03525444.name: VX17-445-102
NCT03525444.group: CF with F508del/F508del genotype (aged >=12y), elexacaftor/tezacaftor/ivacaftor (ELX/TEZ/IVA) vs tezacaftor/ivacaftor 24 wk

allOutcomes.title: Change in ppFEV1 at week 24 (placebo-corrected MD)

NCT03525444.snippet: Source: Heijerman HGM et al. Lancet 2019;394:1940-1948 (VX17-445-102 F508del homo).

evidence.label: Enrollment & Primary Outcome
evidence.text: 107 patients with CF homozygous for F508del randomized to elexacaftor/tezacaftor/ivacaftor (ELX/TEZ/IVA) vs tezacaftor/ivacaftor control (active comparator) for 4 weeks; pooled analysis with Middleton extension gives ppFEV1 improvement 10.0 percentage points vs placebo-equivalent (P<0.0001).

evidence.label: Eligibility (AACT-derived)
evidence.text: AACT-derived (auto-populated 2026-05-04). Sex: ALL; min age 12 Years; healthy volunteers: f. CRITERIA: "Key Inclusion Criteria:~* Heterozygous for the F508del mutation (F/MF)~* Forced expiratory volume in 1 second (FEV1) value ≥40% and ≤90% of predicted mean for age, sex, and height~Key Exclusion Criteria:~* Clinically significant cirrhosis with or without portal hypertension~* Lung infection with organisms associated with a more rapid decline in pulmonary status~* Solid organ or hematological transplantation~Other protocol defined Inclusion/Exclusion criteria may apply"

NCT03525548.name: VX17-445-103
NCT03525548.group: CF with F508del/minimal function genotype (aged >=12y), ELX/TEZ/IVA vs placebo 24 wk

allOutcomes.title: Change in ppFEV1 at week 24 (absolute, placebo-corrected MD)

NCT03525548.snippet: Source: Middleton PG et al. NEJM 2019;381:1809-1819 (VX17-445-103 F508del/MF).

evidence.label: Enrollment & Primary Outcome
evidence.text: 403 patients aged >=12 with CF heterozygous for F508del + minimal-function CFTR mutation randomized 1:1 to ELX/TEZ/IVA (n=200) or placebo (n=203) for 24 weeks. Absolute ppFEV1 improved 14.3 percentage points more with triple modulator (95% CI 12.7-15.8; P<0.001).

evidence.label: Eligibility (AACT-derived)
evidence.text: AACT-derived (auto-populated 2026-05-04). Sex: ALL; min age 12 Years; healthy volunteers: f. CRITERIA: "Key Inclusion Criteria:~* Homozygous for the F508del mutation (F/F)~* Forced expiratory volume in 1 second (FEV1) value ≥40% and ≤90% of predicted mean for age, sex, and height~Key Exclusion Criteria:~* Clinically significant cirrhosis with or without portal hypertension~* Lung infection with organisms associated with a more rapid decline in pulmonary status~* Solid organ or hematological transplantation~Other protocol defined Inclusion/Exclusion criteria may apply"

title: RapidMeta Respiratory | CFTR Modulators in Cystic Fibrosis v1.0
